verification.name: json_parse_and_schema_meta_validation
verification.command: python3 inline validator using json and Draft202012Validator.check_schema
verification.result: all JSON parsed; all six Draft 2020-12 Schemas are meta-valid

verification.name: source_command_matrix_crosscheck
verification.result: 16 source writes exactly classified; 7 allowed and 9 denied

verification.name: allowlist_lease_matrix_crosscheck
verification.command: python3 exact-set and ordered Lease policy crosscheck
verification.result: 14 unique tools; allowed and denied write sets match Lease Schema

verification.name: lease_prepared_claimed_active_conditionals
verification.command: python3 Draft202012Validator positive and negative Lease readiness examples
verification.result: prepared has no process/listener proof; claimed has process proof only; active requires persisted Listener and request-context bindings

verification.name: closeout_exact_zero_table_schema
verification.command: python3 Draft202012Validator positive receipt and bogus-key/Lease-binding rejection checks
verification.result: twelve arbitrary zero keys rejected; all 12 exact business-table names required

verification.name: wire_contract_positive_and_negative_instances
verification.command: python3 Draft202012Validator Envelope, Fixture, Preflight, Lease Event and Closeout instances
verification.result: all positive contracts validate with an explicitly registered strict RFC3339 checker; library-default empty date-time checking was detected and rejected; missing readiness, escaping path evidence, cross-field Fixture mismatch and invalid Event lifecycle bindings fail closed

verification.name: closeout_adversarial_pass_rejection
verification.command: python3 mutate valid PASS receipt with nonzero/passed=false verification, revoked Lease, fake protected asset, gap and wrong verification slot
verification.result: nonzero or passed=false verification, revoked Lease, fake protected asset, gap and wrong verification slot are rejected

verification.name: whitespace_and_secret_pattern_scan
verification.command: rg scans over R2 spec package
verification.result: no trailing whitespace or credential material found

verification.name: manifest_hash_recalculation
verification.command: python3 SHA-256 and byte-count recalculation for every manifest entry
verification.result: all file digests, byte counts and file-list root match

verification.name: sanitized_review_bundle_access_mechanism_precheck
verification.command: review source policy and approved JSON-RPC manage_files access mechanism for 127.0.0.1:8766 and 127.0.0.1:8776
verification.result: access mechanism is available; exact final frozen-bundle bytes are deliberately verified after this source-bound receipt and recorded by the final independent review, not self-attested here

test_interpretation.reason: S1-R3 is a Machine Contract Semantic Closeout authorization; no runtime code changed
